character_buff.name: Danza dell Espine
character_buff.description: Prepare to match the elegance of a waltz with a sword in hand. Additional stats are granted based on the type of armor equipped.

effects: Duration: 300s
ATK +20%
When wearing [Leather Armor]
Additional Damage to [Heavy Armor] type enemy PCs +30%
Additional Damage to [Light Armor] type enemy PCs +20%
Additional Damage to [Soft Armor] type enemy PCs +10%
When wearing [Robe]
Movement Speed +20%
Movement Speed Limit +2.00
ATK against Monsters +50%
IMM +10
Immune to debuffs

stances.name: Copriere
lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [STR]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 3% DMG according to extra [STR]
Ignore additional DEF according to extra [STR] * 4
Additional DMG against Monster according to 5 * 50
